migration_note: No database schema changes; the release is file- and cache-compatible and idempotent.
highlights: Restores the production catalog from detailed Olist product data with atomic, rate-limit-aware synchronization.
Uses one authoritative catalog source across storefront, cart, checkout, shipping, health APIs, sitemap and merchant feed.
Adds CSRF protection and removes deterministic quote-signature fallbacks.
Makes security, quality, Python and Playwright tests deterministic and resistant to false-positive passes.
rollback: Revert version 9.2.102 files; no database rollback is required.
